# Rollback notes

Prefer reverting through version control and the same reviewed deployment workflow.

## Restrict public admin ports
- Action ID: `11111111-1111-1111-1111-111111111111`
- Control ID: `EC2.53`
- Target: `sg-0abc1234def567890`
- Rollback command: `aws ec2 authorize-security-group-ingress --group-id sg-0abc1234def567890 --ip-permissions '[{"IpProtocol":"tcp","FromPort":22,"ToPort":22,"IpRanges":[{"CidrIp":"0.0.0.0/0"}]},{"IpProtocol":"tcp","FromPort":3389,"ToPort":3389,"IpRanges":[{"CidrIp":"0.0.0.0/0"}]}]'`
